# Math sandbox (Gnosis Lean ‚Äî Mathlib reduction)

- Parent README: [../README.md](../README.md)
- Formal index: [../FORMAL_LEDGER.md](../FORMAL_LEDGER.md)
- Physics sandbox (contrast ‚Äî Mathlib showcase): [./PHYSICS_SANDBOX.md](./PHYSICS_SANDBOX.md)
- Dependency graph (Init-only): [./GNOSIS_MATH_DEPENDENCY_GRAPH.md](./GNOSIS_MATH_DEPENDENCY_GRAPH.md)
- Contributing: [./MATH_SANDBOX_CONTRIBUTING.md](./MATH_SANDBOX_CONTRIBUTING.md)
- Vs Mathlib / Std: [./MATH_SANDBOX_VS_MATHLIB.md](./MATH_SANDBOX_VS_MATHLIB.md)
- Init-first replacement roadmap (what to peel vs keep): [./INIT_FIRST_MATHLIB_REPLACEMENT_ROADMAP.md](./INIT_FIRST_MATHLIB_REPLACEMENT_ROADMAP.md)

This document maps the **`Init`-first** ‚Äúmath sandbox‚Äù in `open-source/gnosis/lean/Lean/` and records
**what is proved** in the hub, **what Mathlib debt** exists elsewhere, and **fork / refactor targets**
for the next integration phase.

## Policy (vs physics sandbox)

Long term, Mathlib is replaced by an internally consistent, provable **reduced** layer. The math sandbox
hub imports **no Mathlib**; any `import Mathlib` elsewhere is **technical debt** to peel or replace with
Gnosis-local lemmas (and eventually a curated internal prelude, not a second Mathlib).

**Status:** `lake build MathSandbox`‚Äôs **import closure** is free of `Mathlib` (including `Mathlib.Tactic` ‚Äî
former tactic-only imports in [`GnosisMathPrelude`], [`GnosisMath/ListNat`], [`Hyperoperations`], etc. were
removed in favor of `import Init` / structural imports). [`scripts/validate-init-only-import-closure.mjs`](../scripts/validate-init-only-import-closure.mjs) passes for the [`MathSandbox`](../lean/Lean/MathSandbox.lean) root.

## Entry point

- [`MathSandbox.lean`](../lean/Lean/MathSandbox.lean) ‚Äî import-only hub; build with `lake build MathSandbox`
  (see [`lakefile.lean`](../lean/lakefile.lean) `lean_lib MathSandbox`).

## Layers in the hub (zero Mathlib in this graph)

| Layer | Lean module | Role | Gaps |
|--------|-------------|------|------|
| Prelude | [`GnosisMathPrelude.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GnosisMathPrelude.lean) / [`GnosisMath.Basic`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GnosisMath/Basic.lean) | `powNat`, `mul_pow`-style `powNat_mul_distrib`, list length lemmas in [`ListNat`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GnosisMath/ListNat.lean) | Expand with lemma-by-lemma ports; no wholesale Mathlib |
| Discrete masses (Init-only) | [`DiscreteFiniteInfo.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/DiscreteFiniteInfo.lean) | `finSum`, [`vadd`], [`finSum_vadd`]; [`Rat`] `ratFinSum`; [`MassVec.probRat`], [`ratFinSum_probRat_eq_one`]; [`MassVec.rawMassLog2Weight`] (`‚àë m¬∑log‚ÇÇ m` on `Nat` masses); **zero Mathlib** | Shannon/KL with `Real.log`, `PMF` ‚Äî Mathlib lane ([`ThermoPMFKLFintype`], ‚Ä¶) |
| Coding / discrete | [`KraftInequality.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/KraftInequality.lean) | Kraft-style prefix-free / address-space model | Full analytic Kraft over ‚Ñù, infinite codes |
| Growth / parity | [`GeneralizedParity.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GeneralizedParity.lean) | Bounded multi-pair ‚Äúparity‚Äù checks | Universal quantification over all growth pairs |
| Base ten / F‚ÄìT | [`BaseTenConsequence.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/BaseTenConsequence.lean) | Fork/race/fold narrative + Fibonacci vs triangular structure | Broader ‚Äúbase ten necessity‚Äù claims outside the proved fragment |
| Logic fragment | [`LeibnizCalculemus.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/LeibnizCalculemus.lean) | Finite signs, assignments, truth-table agreement | Completeness of a universal language, full Leibniz program |
| Hyperoperations | [`Hyperoperations.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/Hyperoperations.lean) | `hyperop` hierarchy + `powNat` bridge (no deep `native_decide` on huge towers) | General closed forms beyond the proved slices |
| Fibonacci weights | [`GnosisMath/Fibonacci.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GnosisMath/Fibonacci.lean) | `fibZ` same equations as [`ZeckendorfFST.F`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/ZeckendorfFST.lean) / [`PisotVickreyTable.F`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/PisotVickreyTable.lean) for Init-only consumers | Keep narrative alignment across hubs |
| GreekLogicCanon (Init seed) | [`GreekLogicCanon/DiscreteBoundary.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GreekLogicCanon/DiscreteBoundary.lean) | Placeholder for finite combinatorial / paradox fragments before the monolith splits | Expand with real peeled sections |

## Optional hub (compatibility)

- [`MathSandboxExtras.lean`](../lean/Lean/MathSandboxExtras.lean) ‚Äî `lake build MathSandboxExtras`; re-exports [`MathSandbox.lean`](../lean/Lean/MathSandbox.lean) for backward compatibility and future extras not yet listed in the main hub.

## Corpus modules excluded from the hub (explicit debt or peel)

| Module | Reason |
|--------|--------|
| [`ZeckendorfFST.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/ZeckendorfFST.lean) | **Init-only** (no Mathlib imports); not re-exported from `MathSandbox` by default ‚Äî see [ZECKENDORF_FST_PEEL.md](./ZECKENDORF_FST_PEEL.md). |
| [`PisotVickreyTable.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/PisotVickreyTable.lean) | Companion Pisot/Vickrey lattice file; **`Mathlib.Tactic.Ring` removed**, still uses `Linarith`, `Nat.Log`, `IntervalCases` ‚Äî [PISOT_VICKREY_PEEL.md](./PISOT_VICKREY_PEEL.md). |

## Next-phase integration: fork [`GreekLogicCanon.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GreekLogicCanon.lean)

[`GreekLogicCanon.lean`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GreekLogicCanon.lean) is **not** imported by `MathSandbox`: it uses `import Mathlib` and pulls a wide Gnosis chain (`BuleyeanProbability`, `VoidWalking`, `EnvelopeConvergence`, `CombinatorialBruteForce`, `PhilosophicalAllegories`, ‚Ä¶).

**Refactor / fork plan (prep for Mathlib-reduction integration):**

1. **Split by paradox / section** into submodules under e.g. `ForkRaceFoldTheorems/GreekLogicCanon/` with explicit imports, so Zeno / Achilles / Sorites slices can be linked independently.
2. **Peel Mathlib:** replace wholesale `import Mathlib` with minimal `Mathlib.Analysis.*` (or local analysis lemmas) per slice; move Buleyean-heavy sections behind an optional import or a later hub.
3. **Promote Init-first cores** where possible (mirror `LeibnizCalculemus`-style discipline for finite combinatorial fragments).
4. **Only then** add a chosen slice to [`MathSandbox.lean`](../lean/Lean/MathSandbox.lean) (preferred) or stage it under [`MathSandboxExtras.lean`](../lean/Lean/MathSandboxExtras.lean) with documented Mathlib boundaries.

Until that fork lands, treat `GreekLogicCanon` as **narrative-adjacent formal glue**: valuable, but not part of the reduced hub contract.

## Axiom discipline

Same as [physics sandbox](./PHYSICS_SANDBOX.md): named `opaque` / `axiom` blocks with documented interfaces ‚Äî **no anonymous `sorry`** on promoted surfaces.

## TypeScript lane

[`src/math-sandbox.ts`](../src/math-sandbox.ts) exposes Lean module anchors and optional deterministic numeric toys;
it is **not** proof-checked against Lean (see disclaimer string in that module).

## CI / build

- Default: `lake build` still targets [`ForkRaceFoldTheorems`](../lean/lakefile.lean) (full corpus).
- Focused math hub: `pnpm run validate:lean-minimal` (or `validate:math-sandbox`, same pipeline) from `open-source/gnosis` ‚Äî [`lean-minimal`](../lean-minimal/README.md) `lake build` + [`scripts/validate-init-only-import-closure.mjs`](../scripts/validate-init-only-import-closure.mjs) / config [`init-only-import-closure.json`](../scripts/init-only-import-closure.json) (fails if any configured Init-only root closure imports Mathlib). Roots include [`MathSandbox`](../lean/Lean/MathSandbox.lean), [`DiscreteFiniteInfo`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/DiscreteFiniteInfo.lean), [`LaplaceDemon`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/LaplaceDemon.lean), [`EntropyBridge.LayerC`](../lean/Lean/ForkRaceFoldTheorems/EntropyBridge/LayerC.lean), etc.
- GitHub Actions: `.github/workflows/gnosis-math-sandbox.yml` runs on pushes/PRs that touch the math sandbox Lean paths.
